title: Expository Visualizations
description: Using grocery dataset to analyzes the top five prepared meal brands to identify which offer the best balance of nutritional value: high protein-to-sugar ratios, at reasonable prices.

title: Deceptive Visualizations
description: Using CCRB dataset to explore police complaints filed in New York City and generate visualizations using deceptive techniques to support and refute a propasition.

title: Amazon Reviews as Economic Indicators
description: Using Amazon reviews data to analyze consumer sentiment and its correlation with economic indicators such as GDP.

title: Pedal Patrol
description: Using D3 and MapBox to create an interactive map that visualizes bike traffic patterns in Boston, MA.
